summary: A horizontal abstract painting from the Strata 2026 series, composed around a dark red territorial field crossed by pale incised strata. Red and cyan geometric forms create contrast, depth and a sense of constructed landscape.
concept: In Strata #23 — Red Terrain with Cyan Signs, the surface behaves like a stratified territory where color becomes a sign of presence. The cyan fragments within the red structures suggest rupture, memory or exposed layers beneath the visible field. The incised lines organize the composition as a silent map of tension, distance and transformation.
commercial_note: This work belongs to the Strata 2026 series, a body of abstract paintings centered on territory, fault lines, ground frequency and geometric presence. Its horizontal format and contrast between dark red and cyan give the piece a distinctive contemporary presence, suitable for collectors and architectural interiors seeking a sophisticated abstract
